internal_cognitive_diagram.relevant_history: Father leaves family when Abe is 11 years old. He never sees him again. Mom is overburdened, criticizes when he can't meet her unrealistic expectations. Precipitants to current disorder: Abe struggles and then loses his job and undergoes divorce.
intermediate_beliefs: It's important to be responsible, competent, reliable and helpful.
It's important to work hard and be productive.
During depression: If I avoid challenges, I'll be okay, but if I try to do hard things I'll fail.
During depression: If I avoid asking for help, my incompetence won't show but if I do ask for help, people will see how incompetent I am.
internal_cognitive_diagram.coping_strategies: Avoids asking for help and avoids challenges.

external_experiences.reaction: Automatic thoughts: What if I run out of money? Emotions: anxious, worried, fearful, scared, tense. Behavior: Continues to sit on couch; ruminates about his failures.

external_experiences.situation: Thinking of asking son for help in revising resume.
external_experiences.reaction: Automatic thoughts: I should be able to do this on my own. Emotions: sad, down, lonely, unhappy. Behavior: Avoids asking son for help.

external_experiences.situation: Memory of being criticized by boss.
external_experiences.reaction: Automatic thoughts: I should have tried harder. Emotions: sad, down, lonely, unhappy. Behavior: Ruminates about what a failure he was.
